heroCopy: Train your mind. Be the first!
authSubtitle: Create an account, sign in, or play as a guest.
guestNote: As a guest, you can play, but you will not be able to create packs or share them with the community.
homeSubtitle: Choose one of the modes on the left. The working flows for `Create game` and `Join game` are already connected.
homeCard1Text: Host mode for the game master: choose a pack, create a match, add players, manage the board and scores.
homeCard2Text: Player screen: choose a game, choose your profile, connect live, and hit `Buzz`.
homeCard3Text: Pack builder, community packs, and settings are prepared as separate placeholder screens.
newGameText: Choose a pack from your library or a community pack you have added.
createGamePanelText: Choose a pack from your library or a community pack you have added.
currentGameMetaEmpty: Game information will appear here after creation.
scoreboardText: Current players and their scores are shown here.
scoreboardEmpty: Create a game and add at least one player to see the scoreboard.
hostBoardText: Click a tile to open a question as the host.
packDescriptionEmpty: The description will appear here after loading the board.
boardEmpty: The Jeopardy board will appear here after creating a game.
connectText: Enter a 6-digit game code, choose your player profile and connect live mode.
playerQuestionWaiting: Wait for the host to open a question.
playerGameMetaEmpty: Short game information will appear here after selection.
buzzZoneText: When the host opens a question, the player can press the button below.
waitingStart: Waiting for the game to start
liveInactive: Live connection is not active yet.
audienceBoardText: The player sees only the board state and the current question, without host controls.
playerBoardEmpty: Choose a game to load the player board.
eventLogText: Live game events appear here: question opened, buzzes, and score changes.
eventLogEmpty: Events will appear here after the live connection is established.
packBuilderText: This will become a dedicated pack editor: pack name, categories, questions, values, media, and display order.
communityText: This will become a catalog of public packs with ratings, tags, search, and import to your own library.
settingsText: Profile, sound, theme, language, and game behavior settings will live here.
settingsAvatarText: Choose an image that will appear on player cards during the game.
settingsAvatarTooLarge: Image is too large. Choose a file under 250 KB.
cameraUnsupported: This browser does not support camera access.
signedInMenu: You are in the main menu
signedInStatus: The account is authenticated. All protected API flows are available.
guestStatus: Guest mode is enabled. The menu is available, but some API flows still need dedicated guest support.
notSignedIn: You are not signed in yet.
guestNeedNickname: Enter a nickname for guest access.
gameCreated: Game "{name}" has been created. Join code: {code}.
chooseOrCreateGameFirst: Create or load a game first.
chooseOrCreateGameToConnect: Choose or create a game first.
authRequiredLive: Live mode currently requires an authenticated account.
stageAnswerReopened: {name} answered incorrectly. Buzz is open again.
roundCompleted: The round is complete. You can choose the next question.
finalRoundOpenedEvent: Final question for everyone is open.
questionMarkedUsed: The question has been marked as played.
loadGameByCodeFailed: Failed to find a game by that code.
needIdentityBeforeJoin: Sign in or enter as a guest before joining a game.
liveGuestUnavailable: Live mode is available after sign-in.
hostOpenedQuestion: The host opened the question for {price}.
questionNoAnswer: No answer has been set yet.
builderPackSectionText: Create a pack or open an existing one.
builderCategorySectionText: Add columns to the selected pack.
builderQuestionSectionText: Add a clue to one category.
builderBoardText: Categories and questions appear here after you add them.
builderNoPackMeta: Create or select a pack to start editing.
builderChoosePackFirst: Create or choose a pack first.
builderLinkCategoryFailed: Failed to add the category to the pack
builderLinkQuestionFailed: Failed to add the question to the pack
builderCategoryLimitReached: A board can contain at most 6 categories.
builderQuestionLimitReached: A category can contain at most 5 questions.
builderDeleteQuestionConfirm: Delete this question from the pack?
startCommunityText: Play packs created by other players
registerSubtitle: Create an account to start playing
startCompeteText: Raise your rating and become the best
startPackBuilderText: Create your own question packs with the built-in editor
registerPasswordNote: The password must be at least 8 characters long and contain letters and digits with no spaces.
editScoreInvalid: Enter a valid number for the score.
playerWaitingQuestion: Wait until the host opens a question.
builderRoundSectionText: Create multiple boards inside one pack.
builderFinalNoQuestionYet: Add one final question for all players.
builderFinalNoCategories: Final rounds do not use categories.
builderFinalQuestionLimitReached: A final round can contain only one question.
finalBoardEmpty: Add a final question in the pack builder.
